children.heading: Definition of endowment fund
children.label: a Definition of endowment fund
children.text: In this section, the term “endowment fund” means the Hispanic-Serving Agricultural Colleges and Universities Fund established under subsection (b).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall establish in accordance with this subsection a Hispanic-Serving Agricultural Colleges and Universities Fund.

children.heading: Agreements
children.label: 2 Agreements
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury may enter into such agreements as are necessary to carry out this subsection.

children.label: A
children.text: amounts made available through Acts of appropriations, which shall be the endowment fund corpus; and

children.label: B
children.text: interest earned on the endowment fund corpus.

children.heading: Investments
children.label: 4 Investments
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall invest the endowment fund corpus and income in interest-bearing obligations of the United States.

children.heading: Corpus
children.label: A Corpus
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury may not make a withdrawal or expenditure from the endowment fund corpus.

children.label: i
children.text: 60 percent shall be distributed among the Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities on a pro rata basis based on the Hispanic enrollment count of each institution.

children.label: ii
children.text: 40 percent shall be distributed in equal shares to the Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities.

children.heading: Endowments
children.label: 6 Endowments
children.text: Amounts made available under this subsection shall be held and considered to be granted to Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities to establish an endowment in accordance with this subsection.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 7 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary such sums as are necessary to carry out this subsection for fiscal year 2008 and each fiscal year thereafter.

children.label: B
children.text: the number of Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities.

children.label: A
children.text: the total amount made available by appropriations under paragraph (1); divided by

children.label: B
children.text: the number of Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Amounts authorized to be appropriated under this subsection shall be used in the same manner as is prescribed for colleges under the Act of (commonly known as the “Second Morrill Act”) ( et seq.).August 30, 18907 U.S.C. 321

children.heading: Relationship to other law
children.label: B Relationship to other law
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this subsection, the requirements of that Act shall apply to Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities under this section.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: For fiscal year 2008 and each fiscal year thereafter, the Secretary shall make grants to assist Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities in institutional capacity building (not including alteration, repair, renovation, or construction of buildings).

children.heading: Requirements for grants
children.label: A Requirements for grants
children.text: The Secretary shall make grants under this subsection on the basis of a competitive application process under which Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities may submit applications to the Secretary at such time, in such manner, and containing such information as the Secretary may require.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: As part of an application for a grant under this subsection, the Secretary shall require the applicant to demonstrate need for the grant, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Other sources of funding
children.label: ii Other sources of funding
children.text: The Secretary may award a grant under this subsection only to an applicant that demonstrates a failure to obtain funding for a project after making a reasonable effort to otherwise obtain the funding.

children.heading: Payment of non-Federal share
children.label: C Payment of non-Federal share
children.text: A grant awarded under this subsection shall be made only if the recipient of the grant pays a non-Federal share in an amount that is specified by the Secretary and based on assessed institutional needs.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 3 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary such sums as are necessary to carry out this subsection for fiscal year 2008 and each fiscal year thereafter.

children.label: A
children.text: to fund fundamental and applied research and extension at Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities in agriculture, human nutrition, food science, bioenergy, and environmental science; and

children.label: B
children.text: to award competitive grants to Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities to provide for training in the food and agricultural sciences of Hispanic agricultural workers and Hispanic youth working in the food and agricultural sciences.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 2 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary such sums as are necessary to carry out this subsection for fiscal year 2008 and each fiscal year thereafter.
